echoverseTemplate 1.0.0
  • Get started

Changelog

Source: NEWS.md

echoverseTemplate 1.0.0

Bug fixes

  • Fix Rd formatting and \dontrun{} example guards.
  • Add Rplots.pdf and *.tbi to .gitignore.

echoverseTemplate 0.99.2

Bug fixes

  • Local R CMD check fixes and compatibility updates.

echoverseTemplate 0.99.1

New features

  • Standardize rworkflows.yml with canonical template: enable Docker on ghcr.io, set write-all permissions, use GITHUB_TOKEN.

echoverseTemplate 0.99.0

  • Added a NEWS.md file to track changes to the package.

On this page

Developed by Brian Schilder, Jack Humphrey, Towfique Raj.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
